app.title: League of Legends Skins Wishlists
app.page-doesnt-exist: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist.

skin.priceHelperFull: Approximate price excluding discounts. Gifted skins and chromas are considered purchased, and Exalted skins are considered acquired within the maximum number of attempts (80). Mythic skins and skins with special prices (e.g., Transcendent skins) are not included in the price.

wishlist.create_description: Set a name and choose who can see this wishlist.
wishlist.create_visibilityPublicDescription: Anyone can find and view this wishlist
wishlist.create_visibilityPrivateDescription: Only you can see this wishlist

empty.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quaerat, soluta?
empty.search_desc: Your search did not match any skins. Please clear filters to try again.
empty.collection-skins__desc: You haven't mark any skin as owned.
empty.no-skins_search: No skins with this name or filters found

uploadInventory.title: Upload inventory
uploadInventory.description: If you don't want to mark each skin as owned manually, there's an alternative — a small script that automatically collects your collection data from the League of Legends client.
uploadInventory.howItWorks_text: The script connects to the game client via the League Client Update (LCU) API and retrieves a list of all your owned skins and chromas. Once run, it produces a file with your collection that you can upload here.
uploadInventory.steps_download_note: Download the archive from the <0>latest release page</0>.
uploadInventory.steps_run_note: Instructions for running the script are available on the download page.
uploadInventory.steps_file_note: After the script finishes, a file called inventory.json will appear in the same folder — that's your collection.
uploadInventory.steps_upload_note: Select inventory.json in the field below and wait for the upload to complete.
uploadInventory.error_upload: Failed to upload inventory. Please try again or reach out via one of the links below.
uploadInventory.notes_manual: If for any reason you'd rather not use the script, you can continue marking skins manually.
uploadInventory.notes_safety: The script does not modify any game files and does not interact with your Riot account — it only reads local client data.
uploadInventory.help_title: What to do if something went wrong
uploadInventory.help_description: If the script didn't work or you ran into an unclear issue, you can reach out:
uploadInventory.help_extra: That way I can help you and fix any potential bugs.

temp.wait_file: Please wait a moment, the file is being prepared for download. This may take some time...

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.error-new-unique: New password cannot be the same as old one
